description_long: This object is a pump-action shotgun with a short barrel and a compact, tactical design. The receiver features a decorative engraving or pattern, adding a unique visual element to the otherwise utilitarian appearance. The fore-end is ribbed for grip and is positioned beneath the barrel, indicating a pump-action mechanism. The stock is a pistol grip style, made of dark wood or synthetic material, and the trigger guard is rounded and proportionate to the grip. The barrel and receiver are finished in a dark, matte color, with the fore-end and grip providing contrasting brown tones. The overall build suggests durability and functionality, suitable for close-quarters use in urban environments.
description: A compact, pump-action shotgun with a ribbed fore-end, engraved receiver, and pistol grip stock, finished in dark and brown tones. The design is tactical and visually distinctive.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular barrel opening and the ribbed fore-end beneath, with the pistol grip stock barely visible.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the shotgun, engraved receiver, ribbed fore-end, and the curved pistol grip stock.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the end of the pistol grip stock and the alignment of the barrel and receiver, with minimal detail visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the engraved receiver, ribbed fore-end, and the full profile of the pistol grip stock.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, short tactical length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no visible finger grooves
